base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sea_shrine_tileset — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Sea Shrine — underwater Kraken lair. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Sea Shrine — underwater Kraken lair; coral/seaweed/bubble tiles (128×144)
